blocks.content: Jonathan found me before I could decide anything. That's how he is — the decision gets made for you.
I was almost at the door when he caught up.
He turned like he already knew I was coming. I don't know how he does that.
I was still planted when he spotted me from across the crowd.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: YO. There he is. That's my boy Larry — we go way back.
He said it loud enough for six people to hear. I didn't ask him to.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: You see all this? Day one and it's already like this. I told you.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: People are literally just standing outside.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Bruh they were talking about the AAU film. The one from Westbrook. You remember that game?

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: The one where you dropped the first two and then caught four straight?

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: We don't talk about the first two.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: You literally just brought it up.
I don't know where he learned that word. I'm going to let it go.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Mr. Cole is that real one fr. Aight — come on. Let's go find out what this school is about.

blocks.prompt: They're about to walk through the doors together.

options.label: Walk in with him. Let the room see who you came with.
Let him go first. You'll find your own read on the room.
"Aye — what do you actually know about this place?"
